'''Fidge Tadrazan''' was a young [[Biituian]] who befriended [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] at the time of their encounter with the [[Great Heep]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Biitu]].

==Biography==
He had a reptilian pet and companion named [[Chubb]]. He aided the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in rescuing their owner, [[Mungo Baobab]], from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] stationed on the planet to monitor the Great Heep. After freeing Mungo, they worked to destroy the Great Heep and drive the Imperials from Biitu.

{{Char-stub}}
